title: Cipher Mining Announces August 2025 Operational Update
text: Cipher Mining announced its August 2025 operational results. The company mined 241 BTC in August, sold 42 BTC, and held 1,414 BTC in treasury. The company deployed 115,000 mining rigs, achieving a total operating hashrate of 23.0 EH/s. A significant portion of the production, 39%, came from the Black Pearl Phase I site, which is on track to reach 10 EH/s by the end of the third quarter. With all rig deliveries on schedule, the company maintains expectations that Black Pearl Phase I will reach approximately 10 EH/s by the end of the third quarter, bringing Cipher's total self-mining hashrate to approximately 23.5 EH/s. The production figures include an estimated bitcoin equivalent of about 5 BTC from power sales and approximately 20 BTC mined at joint venture data centers representing Cipher's ownership. This operational update demonstrates the company's continued scaling of mining capacity while preparing for transition to HPC data center operations.
